subparts.text: Differentiate between two major IoT boards in the market?

What is the purpose of using Gyroscopic sensor?

questions.question_text: Explain what is the difference between AI, IoT and Embedded systems? Also explain IoT ecosystem?

Explain major long range and short-range wireless communication devices?
What is Communication Protocol? Also discuss the complete architecture and three layers in communication?

Tesla is a driverless car and does work with AI and IoT? Explain the working of TESLA using IoT components?
What is the role of the sensors in IoT devices? How does position sensor works in Ola for monitoring and tracking positions?
Explain the three in detail along with their different applications- GPS, GLONASS, and IRNSS?
